title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
